headline: Anthropic growth set to boost Amazon’s AWS revenue acceleration, says Bank of America
summary: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) could see an incremental boost to its cloud computing revenue from the rapid growth of artificial intelligence startup Anthropic, according to analysts at Bank of America. In a note to clients, the analysts reiterated a ‘Buy’ rating on Amazon with a $275 price...

headline: PNC Financial's $2B Branch Expansion Strategy: A Smart Growth Move?
summary: PNC is committing about $2B to expand its branch network, adding above 300 locations in nearly 20 U.S. states to boost deposits, loans and growth.

headline: Assessing Bank Of America (BAC) Valuation As Recent Share Momentum Cools
summary: Why Bank of America is on investors’ radar Bank of America (BAC) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share performance, with the stock showing a 0.7% gain over the past day but declines over the week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Bank of America. Set against a 1-year total shareholder return of 21.7% and a 3-year total shareholder return of 66.05%, the recent 30-day share price return decline of 6.9% suggests momentum has cooled for now, as investors reassess...

headline: BofA sees card networks as safest bets, bullish on Visa & Mastercard
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reinstated coverage of several payment companies, saying steady transaction growth and wider use of digital payments continue to support the sector despite recent pressure on sentiment.

headline: 5 of Bank of America’s US1 List Top Picks Also Pay Big Passive Income
summary: Most dividend investors seek solid passive income streams from quality dividend stocks. Passive income is a steady stream of unearned income that doesn’t require active traditional work. Shared ideas for earning passive income include investments such as dividend stocks, bonds, and mutual funds, as well as real estate and additional income-producing side hustles. headline: Eric Trump Says JPMorgan, Wells Fargo And Bank of America Trying To Block Americans From Getting Higher Yields On Savings By Sabotaging Clarity Act
summary: Eric Trump, co-founder of the World Liberty Financial platform, stepped up his attack on U.S. banking giants on Wednesday, March 4, accusing them of "desperately targeting" the cryptocurrency industry.

headline: How The DoorDash (DASH) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Spending Plans And Analyst Revisions
summary: DoorDash’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from $274.69 to $260.90, a cut of about 5% in the latest model update. This shift lines up with Street research, where many firms are lowering price targets after recent Q4 results, Q1 guidance, and management’s plan for heavier investment through 2026, even as some keep positive ratings and others lean more cautious. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets fit into the evolving analyst story and how to keep track of it as an...
